landing.heroSubheadline: Automated, policy-driven oversight for AI deployments in the national health network. Enforcing WHO ethics through zero-trust governance.
landing.card1Desc: Automated bias detection explicitly calibrated for Equalyze's rural populations and aging facility equipment.
landing.card2Desc: Deterministic enforcement of WHO AI ethics principles without requiring in-house data science expertise.
landing.card3Desc: A tamper-evident, append-only audit trail guaranteeing the integrity of every governance decision.
